subject: Project Management
title: Universal Credit
description: Learn Universal Credit in one minute.

hook.text: In 2010, the UK launched Universal Credit to simplify welfare into one payment. It took a decade.

buildup.text: The original IT system was scrapped after two years and £34 million. They started from scratch.

discovery.text: Multiple resets, contractor changes, and political pressure stretched the project across four prime ministers.

twist.text: When COVID hit, Universal Credit had to process millions of new claims. It buckled but didn't break.

climax.text: Universal Credit eventually worked — but at enormous cost and years beyond every deadline.

punchline.text: Simplifying welfare turned out to be anything but simple.

quiz.question: What happened to Universal Credit's original IT system?
options: It was scrapped after two years and £34 million
